awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 25 wins & 71 nominations total
writer: Louis Begley, Alexander Payne, Jim Taylor
actors: Jack Nicholson, Hope Davis, Dermot Mulroney
plot: Warren Schmidt (Jack Nicholson) has led a safe, predictable life working in the insurance industry in Omaha, Nebraska for many years, yet now faces retirement. At the same time, he is forced to take a hard look at his wife, his life, and his relationship with his estranged daughter. An often hilarious series of events follow as Schmidt embarks on an unpredictable RV journey to attend his daughter's wedding in Denver, Colorado.
